scripts.openapi:export: cd ../backend && python -c "import json,sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0,str(Path('.').resolve())); from app.api.main import app; Path('../frontend/openapi.json').write_text(json.dumps(app.openapi(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)+chr(10), encoding='utf-8')"
scripts.openapi:gen: npm run openapi:export && npm run openapi:types
scripts.openapi:gen:live: npm run openapi:export:live && npm run openapi:types
scripts.postinstall: rm -rf public/pdfjs && mkdir -p public/pdfjs && cp -r node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build public/pdfjs/build && cp -r node_modules/pdfjs-dist/web public/pdfjs/web
